Skip to contents
sentit 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Getting started with sentit
    • Concept
    • Architecture
    • Data contracts (schemas)

Package index

ModuleSet adapter

The backend-agnostic contract every core tool depends on, plus the hdWGCNA/Seurat adapter and the self-contained synthetic fixture used in examples and the vignette.

modules()
List the module ids in a module set
gene_membership()
Genes assigned to a module, ranked by membership strength
module_scores()
Per-cell (or per-sample) module scores
expression()
Underlying expression matrix backing a module set
metadata()
Cell / sample metadata for a module set
pkg_versions()
Backend package versions for provenance logging
hdWGCNA_ModuleSet() modules(<hdWGCNA_ModuleSet>) gene_membership(<hdWGCNA_ModuleSet>) module_scores(<hdWGCNA_ModuleSet>) expression(<hdWGCNA_ModuleSet>) metadata(<hdWGCNA_ModuleSet>) pkg_versions(<hdWGCNA_ModuleSet>)
Build a ModuleSet from a Seurat object with an hdWGCNA experiment
synthetic_ModuleSet() modules(<synthetic_ModuleSet>) module_scores(<synthetic_ModuleSet>) gene_membership(<synthetic_ModuleSet>) expression(<synthetic_ModuleSet>) metadata(<synthetic_ModuleSet>) pkg_versions(<synthetic_ModuleSet>)
Wrap a ModuleSet with hand-picked gene sets as synthetic modules
sentit_example_moduleset()
A small, self-contained synthetic ModuleSet for examples and the vignette

Evidence tools

Core deterministic evidence tools; each returns one evidence_fragment.

hub_genes_tool()
Evidence tool: top module genes ranked by membership (kME)
cluster_dme_tool()
Evidence tool: which cell states express this module
module_by_metadata_tool()
Evidence tool: module score vs. a declared metadata column
geneset_enrichment_tool()
Evidence tool: gene-set enrichment among a module's hub genes
import_fragment()
Import a user-supplied result table as an evidence fragment
import_fragment_tool()
ctx-compatible tool wrapper around import_fragment()

Evidence fragments and packets

The evidence_fragment / evidence packet data contract.

evidence_fragment()
Construct an evidence fragment
validate_evidence_fragment()
Validate an evidence fragment
fragment_to_json()
Serialize an evidence fragment to JSON
fragment_from_json()
Parse an evidence fragment from JSON
build_evidence_packet()
Assemble and hash a module's evidence packet
packet_to_json()
Serialize an evidence packet to JSON
write_evidence_packet()
Write an evidence packet to a JSON file
read_evidence_packet()
Read an evidence packet from a JSON file
write_fragment_tables()
Write every fragment's full result table alongside a packet
make_provenance()
Build a fragment's provenance record

Orchestration

Run tools/synthesis over a module set and write results to disk.

run_module()
Run one module's evidence tools and build its evidence packet
run_orchestrator()
Run a configured set of evidence tools over every module in a ModuleSet
synthesize_module()
Synthesize one evidence packet into a validated interpretation
run_synthesis_orchestrator()
Run synthesis over a batch of evidence packets

Dataset context and prompts

dataset_description()
Construct a dataset description
validate_dataset_description()
Validate a dataset description
render_dataset_description()
Render a dataset description as a compact text block
PROMPT_TEMPLATE_VERSION
Prompt template version
render_packet_compact()
Render an evidence packet as a compact model-facing text block
build_system_prompt()
Build the synthesis system prompt
build_user_prompt()
Build the synthesis user prompt for one module

Synthesis backends

Model-agnostic packet -> interpretation synthesis.

synthesize_interpretation()
Synthesize one evidence packet into an interpretation via a backend
mock_backend()
Offline mock synthesis backend
ellmer_backend()
Live synthesis backend via ellmer structured output
resolve_backend()
Resolve a synthesis backend from a provider name
cached_backend()
Cache a synthesis backend's raw model calls on disk
model_output_schema_json()
Model-facing interpretation schema, derived from the canonical schema

Faithfulness and confidence

Guardrails between the model’s output and the deterministic evidence.

check_faithfulness()
Check citation faithfulness of an interpretation against its packet
is_faithful()
Is an interpretation faithful to its evidence packet?
assert_faithfulness()
Hard-reject an interpretation with any faithfulness violation
enforce_faithfulness()
Flag (rather than reject) an interpretation with faithfulness violations
compute_evidence_signals()
Compute deterministic evidence signals from a packet
fuse_confidence()
Fuse model and deterministic confidence into a final score and flags
needs_review()
Does an interpretation need human review?

Interpretation objects

interpretation()
Construct an interpretation object
validate_interpretation()
Validate an interpretation object
interpretation_to_json()
Serialize an interpretation to JSON
interpretation_from_json()
Parse an interpretation from JSON
interpretation_hash()
Hash an interpretation
make_interpretation_provenance()
Build an interpretation's provenance record
read_interpretation()
Read an interpretation from a JSON file
write_interpretation()
Write an interpretation to a JSON file

Rendering and review

RENDER_TEMPLATE_VERSION
Render template version
render_paragraph()
Render an interpretation as a paragraph
describe_flags()
Describe an interpretation's flags in human-readable form
build_review_queue()
Build the review queue from a batch of interpretations
write_review_queue()
Write the review queue to a TSV file
build_synthesis_manifest()
Build a run-level synthesis manifest
write_synthesis_manifest()
Write a synthesis manifest to a JSON file

Statistical helpers

categorical_group_test()
One-vs-rest categorical group test with an omnibus Kruskal-Wallis test
continuous_correlation_test()
Pearson and Spearman correlation of module scores against a continuous variable
aggregate_by_sample()
Aggregate module scores to the sample level
is_sample_constant()
Check whether a variable is constant within every sample

On this page

Developed by Sam Morabito.
